caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER DO SHIT" speaks into a professional black microphone. He is seated in a room featuring a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments in the background. A white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands behind him. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left and red text on the right that reads "REDLY FLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, talking and slightly adjusting his facial expressions while maintaining a forward-facing gaze. The background remains constant, and the only movement is the subtle shifting of his mouth and eyes as he speaks into the microphone.
